posts.title: Solving exp(exp(z)) = 1 on the Complex Plane
posts.text: IntroductionIn this note, we solve the equation $$e^{e^z}=1,$$ for all complex numbers $z\in\mathbb{C}$. A useful idea is to first solve a simpler outer equation, and then pull it back through the inner exponential. Step 1: Solve $e^w=1$For complex $w$, $$e^w=1 \quad \Longleftrightarrow \quad w=2\pi i k,\ \ k\in\mathbb{Z}.$$ Now let $w=e^z$. Then $$e^z=2\pi i k,\qquad k\in\mathbb{Z}.$$ Since $e^z\neq 0$, the case $k=0$ is impossible. So we only consider $k\in\mathbb{Z}\setminus{0}$. Step 2: Solve $e^z=2\pi i k$Write $z=x+iy$ with $x,y\in\mathbb{R}$. Then $$e^z=e^{x+iy}=e^x(\cos y+i\sin y).$$ Matching real and imaginary parts with $2\pi i k$: $$e^x\cos y=0,\qquad e^x\sin y=2\pi k.$$ Because $e^x>0$, the first equation gives $\cos y=0$, so $$y=\frac\pi2+n\pi,\qquad n\in\mathbb{Z}.$$ Hence $\sin y=\pm1$, and we split by the sign of $k$: If $k>0$, then $\sin y=1$, so$$y=\frac\pi2+2\pi m,\quad m\in\mathbb{Z},$$and$$x=\ln(2\pi k).$$ If $k<0$, then $\sin y=-1$, so$$y=\frac{3\pi}{2}+2\pi m,\quad m\in\mathbb{Z},$$and$$x=\ln(-2\pi k).$$ Final Solution SetTherefore, $$\begin{cases}z=\ln(2\pi k)+i\left(\dfrac\pi2+2\pi m\right), & k>0,\ \ k,m\in\mathbb{Z},\z=\ln(-2\pi k)+i\left(\dfrac{3\pi}{2}+2\pi m\right), & k<0,\ \ k,m\in\mathbb{Z}.\end{cases}$$ Equivalently, with $k\in\mathbb{Z}\setminus{0}$: $$z=\ln(2\pi|k|)+i\big(\arg(ik)+2\pi m\big),\qquad m\in\mathbb{Z},$$ where $\arg(ik)=\frac\pi2$ when $k>0$, and $\arg(ik)=\frac{3\pi}{2}$ when $k<0$ (mod $2\pi$).

pages.text: /* Profile widget typography tweaks to get a Lei-Mao-like feel: * - Serif name * - Italic, smaller multi-line title * - Respect YAML newlines via `white-space: pre-line` */ @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,500;0,600;1,400;1,500&family=Merriweather:wght@300;400;700&family=Oswald:wght@400;500;600&display=swap'); /* Only affect the profile card. */ .card.widget[data-type="profile"] { --profile-serif: "Cormorant Garamond", Georgia, "Times New Roman", Times, serif; } /* Name */ .card.widget[data-type="profile"] .card-content > nav.level:first-of-type p.title { font-family: var(--profile-serif); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.01em; font-size: 1.75rem; /* smaller than default is-size-4 */ line-height: 1.05; margin-bottom: 0.35rem; } /* Title (multi-line) */ .card.widget[data-type="profile"] .card-content > nav.level:first-of-type p.is-size-6.is-block { font-family: var(--profile-serif); font-style: italic; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1.1rem; line-height: 1.25; white-space: pre-line; /* make YAML newlines render as line breaks */ margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 0.35rem; } /* Location */ .card.widget[data-type="profile"] .card-content > nav.level:first-of-type p.is-size-6.is-flex { /* Match reference: location is larger and not italic, with normal theme font */ font-family: inherit; font-style: normal; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.25rem; line-height: 1.2; margin-top: 0; } .card.widget[data-type="profile"] .card-content > nav.level:first-of-type p.is-size-6.is-flex i { font-size: 1.15em; } /* Center align like the reference screenshot. */ .card.widget[data-type="profile"] .card-content > nav.level:first-of-type .level-item.has-text-centered { text-align: center !important; } .card.widget[data-type="profile"] .card-content > nav.level:first-of-type figure.image { margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; } /* ===== Article typography/layout cleanup (reference-inspired) ===== */ .article .title, .article h1, .article h2, .article h3 { font-family: "Oswald", "Arial Narrow", Arial, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.01em; } .article .title.is-3 { font-size: 3rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.15; margin-bottom: 1.1rem; } .article .content { font-family: "Merriweather", Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif; font-size: 1.28rem; line-height: 1.85; color: #2d2d2d; } .article .content h2 { font-size: 2.15rem; font-weight: 500; margin-top: 2.2rem; margin-bottom: 0.8rem; } .article .content h3 { font-size: 1.55rem; font-weight: 500; } /* Hide duplicate-looking anchor text beside section titles */ .article .content .headerlink { display: none; } /* Cleaner metadata row */ .article .article-meta { font-family: "Oswald", "Arial Narrow", Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 1.05rem; letter-spacing: 0.02em; } .article .article-meta .level-item { margin-right: 1rem; }
